target.label: Post-Epic Deferred Work Cleanup — DW1 through DW5

rationale: P0 coverage is 5% (required: 100%). 11 critical (P0) acceptance criteria are uncovered across DW1, DW2, DW3, DW4, and DW5. All 5 stories are at status ready-for-dev, so this gate measures readiness vs. intended target — not delivered functionality. FAIL is the expected and correct signal: dev-story execution must be preceded by ATDD scaffolding for the 11 P0 NONE items.
